title: alchemilla sylvestris var. subcrenata
intro: Alchemilla sylvestris var. subcrenata, commonly known as the lady's mantle or alchemilla, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent qualities. It is used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and menstrual problems, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Alchemilla sylvestris var. subcrenata can be used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
